en: For since the law has but a shadow of the good things to come instead of the true form of these realities, it can never, by the same sacrifices that are continually offered every year, make perfect those who draw near.
zh: 律法既然是以後要來的美好事物的影子，不是本體的真象，就不能憑著每年獻同樣的祭品，使那些進前來的人得到完全。

en: Otherwise, would they not have ceased to be offered, since the worshipers, having once been cleansed, would no longer have any consciousness of sin?
zh: 如果敬拜的人一次得潔淨，良心就不再覺得有罪，那麼，獻祭的事不是早就停止了嗎？

en: But in these sacrifices there is a reminder of sin every year.
zh: 可是那些祭品，卻使人每年都想起罪來，

en: For it is impossible for the blood of bulls and goats to take away sins.
zh: 因為公牛和山羊的血不能把罪除去。

en: Consequently, when Christ came into the world, he said, "Sacrifices and offerings you have not desired, but a body have you prepared for me;
zh: 所以，基督到世上來的時候，就說： “祭品和禮物不是你所要的， 你卻為我預備了身體。

en: in burnt offerings and sin offerings you have taken no pleasure.
zh: 燔祭和贖罪祭， 不是你所喜悅的；

en: Then I said, 'Behold, I have come to do your will, O God, as it is written of me in the scroll of the book.'"
zh: 那時我說： ‘看哪！我來了， 經卷上已經記載我的事， 神啊！我來是要遵行你的旨意。’”

en: When he said above, "You have neither desired nor taken pleasure in sacrifices and offerings and burnt offerings and sin offerings" (these are offered according to the law),
zh: 前面說：“祭品和禮物，燔祭和贖罪祭，不是你所要的，也不是你所喜悅的。”這些都是按照律法獻的；

en: then he added, "Behold, I have come to do your will." He abolishes the first in order to establish the second.
zh: 接著又說：“看哪！我來了，是要遵行你的旨意。”可見他廢除那先前的，為要建立那後來的。

en: And by that will we have been sanctified through the offering of the body of Jesus Christ once for all.
zh: 我們憑著這旨意，藉著耶穌基督一次獻上他的身體，就已經成聖。

en: And every priest stands daily at his service, offering repeatedly the same sacrifices, which can never take away sins.
zh: 所有的祭司都是天天站著事奉，多次獻上同樣的祭品，那些祭品永遠不能把罪除去。

en: But when Christ had offered for all time a single sacrifice for sins, he sat down at the right hand of God,
zh: 唯有基督獻上了一次永遠有效的贖罪祭，就在 神的右邊坐下來。

en: waiting from that time until his enemies should be made a footstool for his feet.
zh: 此後，只是等待 神把他的仇敵放在他的腳下，作他的腳凳。

en: For by a single offering he has perfected for all time those who are being sanctified.
zh: 因為他獻上了一次的祭，就使那些成聖的人永遠得到完全。

en: And the Holy Spirit also bears witness to us; for after saying,
zh: 聖靈也向我們作見證，因為後來他說過：

en: "This is the covenant that I will make with them after those days, declares the Lord: I will put my laws on their hearts, and write them on their minds,"
zh: “主說：‘在那些日子以後， 我要與他們所立的約是這樣： 我要把我的律法放在他們的心思裡面， 寫在他們的心上。’”

en: then he adds, "I will remember their sins and their lawless deeds no more."
zh: 又說：“我決不再記著他們的罪惡， 和不法的行為。”

en: Where there is forgiveness of these, there is no longer any offering for sin.
zh: 這一切既然都赦免了，就不必再為罪獻祭了。

en: Therefore, brothers, since we have confidence to enter the holy places by the blood of Jesus,
zh: 所以，弟兄們！我們憑著耶穌的血，可以坦然無懼地進入至聖所。

en: by the new and living way that he opened for us through the curtain, that is, through his flesh,
zh: 這進入的路，是他給我們開闢的，是一條通過幔子、又新又活的路，這幔子就是他的身體。

en: and since we have a great priest over the house of God,
zh: 我們既然有一位偉大的祭司治理 神的家，

en: let us draw near with a true heart in full assurance of faith, with our hearts sprinkled clean from an evil conscience and our bodies washed with pure water.
zh: 我們良心的邪惡既然被灑淨，身體也用清水洗淨了，那麼，我們就應該懷著真誠的心和完備的信，進到 神面前；

en: Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for he who promised is faithful.
zh: 又應該堅持我們所宣認的盼望，毫不動搖，因為那應許我們的是信實的。

en: And let us consider how to stir up one another to love and good works,
zh: 我們又應該彼此關心，激發愛心，勉勵行善。

en: not neglecting to meet together, as is the habit of some, but encouraging one another, and all the more as you see the Day drawing near.
zh: 我們不可放棄聚會，好像有些人的習慣一樣；卻要互相勸勉。你們既然知道那日子臨近，就更應該這樣。

en: For if we go on sinning deliberately after receiving the knowledge of the truth, there no longer remains a sacrifice for sins,
zh: 如果我們領受了真理的知識以後，還是故意犯罪，就再沒有留下贖罪的祭品了；

en: but a fearful expectation of judgment, and a fury of fire that will consume the adversaries.
zh: 只好恐懼地等待著審判，和那快要吞滅眾仇敵的烈火。

en: Anyone who has set aside the law of Moses dies without mercy on the evidence of two or three witnesses.
zh: 如果有人干犯了摩西的律法，憑著兩三個證人，他尚且得不到憐憫而死；

en: How much worse punishment, do you think, will be deserved by the one who has spurned the Son of God, and has profaned the blood of the covenant by which he was sanctified, and has outraged the Spirit of grace?
zh: 何況是踐踏 神的兒子，把那使他成聖的立約的血當作俗物，又侮辱施恩的聖靈的人，你們想想，他不是應該受更嚴厲的刑罰嗎？

en: For we know him who said, "Vengeance is mine; I will repay." And again, "The Lord will judge his people."
zh: 因為我們知道誰說過： “伸冤在我，我必報應。” 又說： “主必定審判他自己的子民。”

en: It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of the living God.
zh: 落在永活的 神手裡，真是可怕的。

en: But recall the former days when, after you were enlightened, you endured a hard struggle with sufferings,
zh: 你們要回想從前的日子，那時，你們蒙了光照，忍受了許多痛苦的煎熬；

en: sometimes being publicly exposed to reproach and affliction, and sometimes being partners with those so treated.
zh: 有時在眾人面前被辱罵，遭患難；有時卻成了遭遇同樣情形的人的同伴。

en: For you had compassion on those in prison, and you joyfully accepted the plundering of your property, since you knew that you yourselves had a better possession and an abiding one.
zh: 你們同情那些遭監禁的人；你們的家業被搶奪的時候，又以喜樂的心接受，因為知道自己有更美長存的家業。

en: Therefore do not throw away your confidence, which has a great reward.
zh: 所以，你們不可丟棄坦然無懼的心，這樣的心是帶有大賞賜的。

en: For you have need of endurance, so that when you have done the will of God you may receive what is promised.
zh: 你們還需要忍耐，好使你們行完了 神的旨意，可以領受所應許的。

en: For, "Yet a little while, and the coming one will come and will not delay;
zh: 因為： “還有一點點的時候， 那要來的就來， 並不遲延。

en: but my righteous one shall live by faith, and if he shrinks back, my soul has no pleasure in him."
zh: 我的義人必因信得生， 如果他後退， 我的心就不喜悅他。”

en: But we are not of those who shrink back and are destroyed, but of those who have faith and preserve their souls.
zh: 但我們不是那些後退以致滅亡的人，而是有信心以致保全生命的人。
